profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Graha Mitra Asia Tbk provides real estate and property development services in Indonesia. The company provides real estate agency, real estate brokers, and intermediaries for buying, selling, leasing real estate on a fee or contract basis; real estate management services; and real estate appraisal services, as well as real estate probate agent services. PT Graha Mitra Asia Tbk was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Bogor, Indonesia.
